mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info
SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info WHERE model = #{model}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cpu_info (brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{brand}, #{model}, #{interfaceType}, #{cores}, #{threads}, #{baseFrequency}, #{maxFrequency}, #{tdp}, #{integratedGraphics}, #{releaseDate}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE cpu_info SET brand = #{brand}, model = #{model}, interface_type = #{interfaceType}, cores = #{cores}, threads = #{threads}, base_frequency = #{baseFrequency}, max_frequency = #{maxFrequency}, tdp = #{tdp}, integrated_graphics = #{integratedGraphics}, release_date = #{releaseDate}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, brand, model, interface_type, cores, threads, base_frequency, max_frequency, tdp, integrated_graphics, release_date, create_time, update_time FROM cpu_info WHERE LOWER(brand) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%') OR LOWER(model) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{term}), '%')
